case_title: ANDERSON, WILLIAM R. et al VS FREE WORLD TOURS AND INDIA TOURS INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-07-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-23-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY ANDERSON, WILLIAM R. ANDERSON, VERA AS TO DEFENDANT FREE WORLD TOURS AND INDIA TOURS INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-07-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
